inputs.label: Desired Annual Income
inputs.businessContext: Total annual income desired during retirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual income desired during retirement.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtes jährliches Einkommen, das im Ruhestand gewünscht wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu annuel total souhaité pendant la retraite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso anual total deseado durante la jubilación.

inputs.label: Other Annual Income
inputs.businessContext: Annual income from other sources (e.g., Social Security, pension).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual income from other sources (e.g., Social Security, pension).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Diğer kaynaklardan (ör. Sosyal Güvenlik, emekli maaşı) elde edilen yıllık gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliches Einkommen aus anderen Quellen (z. B. Sozialversicherung, Rente).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu annuel provenant d'autres sources (ex. : Sécurité sociale, pension).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso anual de otras fuentes (ej. Seguridad Social, pensión).

inputs.label: Withdrawal Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual withdrawal rate as a percentage of savings (commonly 4%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual withdrawal rate as a percentage of savings (commonly 4%).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Entnahmerate als Prozentsatz des Ersparten (üblich 4 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de retrait annuel en pourcentage de l'épargne (généralement 4 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de retiro anual como porcentaje del ahorro (comúnmente 4%).
Total de ahorros actuales para la jubilación.
